Event: Magic Well - March 2024
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR25


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Driller Chest
Crimson Guardian Plate Mail

Once in a while, the unit gains a shield that absorbs all incoming physical damage for 4 sec. While the shield is active, the unit can't be stunned, frozen, or petrified. When the shield wears off, 75% of the damage absorbed by the shield is dealt to a random enemy as physical damage.

Requirements: 98-100
